titlestmt.titleproper: Gordon E. White photographs and papers35-11-2573
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Gordon E. White photographs and papers
did.abstract: Negatives, 4x5 cut film, taken at Cornell University for the Cornell Sun, for the Cornellian, and for personal interest; photographs and prints; student ephemera; reunion documents.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Gordon E. White, Cornell University Class of 1955, was photo editor of the Cornell Daily Sun and the Cornellian.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection contains negatives, 4x5 cut film, taken at Cornell University for the Cornell Daily Sun, for the Cornellian and for personal interest; photographs and prints for the Cornell Daily Sun; Class of 1955 reunion documents; student ephemera; Cornell Daily Sun newspaper clippings; and publications.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Gordon E. White photographs and papers, #35-11-2573. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Former collection title: Gordon E. White negatives.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also Pi Kappa Phi, Psi chapter records #37-4-4384 for photographs of White at various fraternity formals.

unittitle.extref: Link to partial finding aid for negatives.
